title: RNA velocity objects of FACS-sorted (CD31+/CD45-) endothelial cells of individual pathological entities
author: Ghobrial, Moheb
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
RNA velocity objects (zip files of .h5ad) of FACS-sorted (CD31+/CD45-) endothelial cells of individual pathological entities   
   -> part of the manuscript: Single-cell atlas of the human brain vasculature across development, adulthood and disease      https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-024-07493-y    
   
 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 
  -i) AVM sorted endothelial cells_RNA velocity.zip:        -> this is a zip file of an RNA velocity object (.h5ad) of FACS-sorted (CD31+/CD45-) endothelial cells isolated from brain arteriovenous malformations (AVM) (a brain vascular malformation).   - ii) LGG sorted endothelial cells_RNA velocity.zip:        -> this is a zip file of an RNA velocity object (.h5ad) of FACS-sorted (CD31+/CD45-) endothelial cells isolated from lower-grade gliomas (LGG) (a brain tumor)   - iii) GBM sorted endothelial cells_RNA velocity.zip:        -> this is a zip file of an RNA velocity object (.h5ad) of FACS-sorted (CD31+/CD45-) endothelial cells isolated from high-grade gliomas (glioblastoma (GBM)) (a brain tumor).   - iv) MET sorted endothelial cells_RNA velocity.zip:        -> this is a zip file of an RNA velocity object (.h5ad) of FACS-sorted (CD31+/CD45-) endothelial cells isolated from brain metastasis (MET) (a brain tumor).   - v) MEN sorted endothelial cells_RNA velocity.zip:        -> this is a zip file of an RNA velocity object (.h5ad) of FACS-sorted (CD31+/CD45-) endothelial cells isolated from brain meningioma (MEN) (a brain tumor).
